notes: Solid Galaga clone with working dive patterns, capture beam, dual-ship mechanic, bonus stages, and sound — but enemy sprites are basic rectangles rather than authentic Galaga pixel art, and the capture/rescue logic has some edge-case roughness.
A competent and mostly working Galaga-like with solid controls and no obvious fatal errors, but several mechanics and visuals are simplified or inaccurate versus authentic Galaga.
